findings.title: Unauthenticated Promptfoo eval server — LLM provider configs and eval dataset exposed
findings.description: Promptfoo Express server running on port 443/80. GET /api/user/email returns {email:null} confirming unauthenticated instance. GET /api/providers returns 60 LLM provider configurations including Anthropic Claude 4.x Haiku/Sonnet/Opus and Azure GPT-4o with temperature and max_tokens parameters. GET /api/datasets returns active eval datasets with test cases, prompt templates, eval run history with token usage statistics. Red-team evaluation platform accessible without authentication.

findings.title: Unauthenticated Promptfoo — LLM rubric eval data exposed
findings.description: Promptfoo unauth on AWS India. /api/user/email={email:null}. /api/datasets returns eval with llm-rubric assertions and story generation test cases with penguin/tropical island prompts and child-safety rubric evaluation.
